title: TrackMyJobs
shortDescription: A production-ready job application tracking platform with analytics, CV management, and secure authentication.
description: TrackMyJobs is a full-stack web application designed to streamline and optimize the job search process. Built with a scalable architecture, it enables users to manage applications, upload and track CVs, and gain real-time insights into their progress. The platform focuses on solving a real-world problem with a clean user experience, secure authentication, and efficient data handling across the entire stack.
features: Secure JWT-based authentication with protected routes
Robust CV/resume upload system with original filename preservation
Real-time dashboard analytics with application status breakdown
Full CRUD functionality for managing job applications
Advanced search and filtering by company, role, and status
Pagination system for scalable data handling
File validation with strict type and size constraints
Responsive, modern UI with a bold neo-brutalist design system
Deployed production environment using Netlify, Render, and Supabase

title: FileFlow
shortDescription: A modern desktop file organization tool that automates folder management with a clean, SaaS-inspired UI.
description: FileFlow is a desktop application built to eliminate clutter and streamline file management workflows. Designed with a focus on usability and automation, it intelligently organizes files based on type while providing users with real-time feedback and control. The application combines practical utility with a polished interface, showcasing strong capabilities in system-level programming, UI design, and user-focused tooling. Packaged for distribution using PyInstaller, simulating a real-world desktop software release.
features: One-click automated file organization by type and extension
Custom category configuration directly through the UI
Real-time statistics dashboard for file distribution insights
Comprehensive file movement history tracking
Persistent folder memory for improved workflow efficiency
Modern, responsive UI built with CustomTkinter
Duplicate file handling with automatic renaming logic

title: MindGuard Journal
shortDescription: A privacy-focused AI-assisted journaling platform for emotional insight and pattern recognition.
description: MindGuard Journal is a full-stack, privacy-first journaling application designed to help users better understand their emotional patterns and triggers. It combines structured journaling with a custom-built analysis engine to provide actionable insights, grounding techniques, and mental clarity — all while maintaining strict user data isolation and security.
features: Secure Supabase authentication with user-scoped data access
Custom AI-powered emotional pattern analysis across multiple dimensions
Trauma trigger detection with intensity-based insights
Personalized grounding techniques and coping recommendations
Interactive dashboard with visual risk indicators
Expandable journal history with structured entries
Row Level Security (RLS) implementation for data privacy
Fully responsive and modern UI/UX design

title: MealPlanner Pro
shortDescription: A smart meal planning system that automates recipes, inventory, and grocery workflows.
description: MealPlanner Pro is a full-stack web application built to eliminate the daily friction of meal planning and kitchen management. It centralizes recipes, tracks available ingredients, and automatically generates grocery lists, creating a seamless workflow from planning to execution.
features: Centralized recipe management system
Dynamic weekly meal planning interface
Automated grocery list generation based on selected meals
Kitchen inventory tracking with real-time updates
Barcode scanning integration for faster input
Voice-based grocery input for improved usability

title: Kaizen
shortDescription: A structured productivity system inspired by continuous improvement principles.
description: Kaizen is a full-stack productivity application inspired by the philosophy of continuous improvement. It provides a structured workflow for task management, enabling users to move work through defined stages while maintaining clarity, focus, and efficiency. Built with a scalable backend and clean interface, it emphasizes simplicity and consistency.
features: Structured task workflow (Todo, In Progress, Done)
Tag-based organization for improved task categorization
Responsive and user-friendly interface
Persistent data management with MySQL integration

title: Deadline Master
shortDescription: A modern React-based productivity app for tracking deadlines with real-time visual feedback.
description: Deadline Master is a frontend-focused productivity application designed to help users manage deadlines with clarity and urgency. It leverages real-time countdowns, priority systems, and visual alerts to create an intuitive and engaging task management experience.
features: Real-time countdown timer with precise time breakdown
Priority-based task management (High, Medium, Low)
Task completion tracking with edit and delete functionality
Persistent local storage for data retention
Dynamic visual alerts for urgent and overdue tasks
Glassmorphism UI with smooth micro-interactions

title: Travelo
shortDescription: A responsive travel landing page with interactive UI and theme customization.
description: Travelo is a responsive frontend project focused on delivering a polished landing page experience. It showcases strong UI fundamentals, interactive navigation, and smooth user interactions, with attention to responsiveness and modern design patterns.
features: Fully responsive layout across all device sizes
Interactive navigation with scroll and hover effects
Persistent fixed header for improved usability
Smooth scrolling interactions
Structured sections including hero, destinations, and testimonials
Functional booking form interface
Light and dark mode theme toggle
